```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

## Parametros
p0    <- sample(c(0.3, 0.4, 0.5), 1)
n     <- sample(c(20, 25, 30), 1)
alpha <- 0.05

## Ponto critico: rejeita quando sum Xi >= k_val
k_val <- qbinom(1 - alpha, n, p0)
while (1 - pbinom(k_val - 1, n, p0) > alpha) {
  k_val <- k_val + 1
}

p1_val <- round(p0 + 0.2, 1)

## Poder
correct <- round(1 - pbinom(k_val - 1, n, p1_val), 4)
w1 <- round(pbinom(k_val - 1, n, p1_val), 4)
w2 <- round(1 - pbinom(k_val, n, p1_val), 4)
w3 <- round(1 - pbinom(k_val - 1, n, p0), 4)
w4 <- round(alpha, 4)

all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)
# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========
Para $X_i \overset{\text{iid}}{\sim} \text{Bernoulli}(p)$, o teste UMP para $H_0:p \leq `r p0`$ vs. $H_1:p > `r p0`$ com $n = `r n`$ e $\alpha \approx 0{,}05$ rejeita quando $\sum X_i \geq `r k_val`$. O poder do teste quando $p = `r p1_val`$ e:

Answerlist
----------
* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========
Poder $= P\!\left(\sum X_i \geq `r k_val` \mid p = `r p1_val`\right) = 1 - P\!\left(\sum X_i \leq `r k_val-1` \mid p = `r p1_val`\right) = 1 - \text{pbinom}(`r k_val-1`, `r n`, `r p1_val`) = `r correct`$.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap6S3Q8_UMP_Bernoulli_poder
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
